svg.text: Sequence choice changes the shape, not just the color.
Short alternation gives a crisp, highly structured stability frontier.
Good first sequence when you want the classic Lyapunov-fractal feel fast.
Longer symbolic forcing folds the parameter plane into denser islands.
Same map, different forcing grammar, visibly different geometry.
The useful lesson: the word over A/B is part of the experiment.
This is why a tiny sequence-report tool belongs next to the images.
